refactor: modify ExperimentManager to take config instead of agent_config and call before session creation
feat(cli): add agent state validation to /resume command
Honor user-set flag for LOG_TO_FILE
Fix Tavily search API key placeholder format
feat: allow optional HTTP protocol for self-hosted GitLab instances
docs: fix typos and update section numbering in Development.md
fix(docker-runtime): adjust default port ranges to avoid Windows ephemeral ports
Fix: Display logout option even when user is not available
Always install Docker with MTU 1450 configuration
[Feature Request]: Make git username and email configurable
[CLI] Add default `fetch` MCP server & update doc to require `uvx`
docs: update CodeAct agent step method Returns documentation
Fix litellm_proxy model info JSON parsing error handling
Update git configuration instructions in CodeAct agent system prompts
Set default condenser to `ConversationWindowCondenser`
Add unit tests for LocalRuntime's vscode_url and web_hosts methods
Add branch information to repository context to prevent unwanted branch switching
Add LLM disclaimer to Slack integration documentation
Revert "Add experiment for agent config"
Fix for issued due to changes in spec for custom secrets
Patch release 0.51.1
fix: update openhands local runtime to handle provider tokens correctly
Fixes for git diff viewer
fix(runtime): use async in git clone
Improve connecting status messages with time expectations
chore: env for installing third party providers
Make backend and frontend ports configurable in Makefile
fix(conf): add cause to re-raised value-error to keep context.
feat(frontend): Memory UI
feat(frontend): integrate with the updated get microagents API for the microagent management page.
fix(feedback): Batch event feedback status request
Release 0.51.0
Fix user input commands being echoed twice in terminal
refactor: improve the get microagents API
Improve LLM call metadata
Remove task completion status message from finish action display
Add search API key settings to CLI
feat(frontend): improve conversation card context menu
Add qwen-3-coder-480b to OpenHands provider
feat: the action panel / canvas can be toggled on the conversation page.
[CLI] Fix errno 21 warning when reading directory
perf(gemini): Apply Gemini 2.5 Pro performance optimizations from PR 9913
Add maintenance banner feature
Fix make lint dependencies to work out of the box
Fix for app/worker urls
Improve OpenHands authentication error message
feat: show export trajectory button in SaaS mode for debugging
Fix MCP config priority logic in sessions.py
Add experiment for agent config
Fix git changes panel
Add IP whitelisting information for Bitbucket Cloud integration
refactor: microagent management tests
Optimize pre commit hooks
Replace bash scripts with Python for git operations
feat: Add configurable runtime support for issue resolver and fix: Kubernetes pod naming limits
refactor: move session initialization from WebSocket to REST API
fix(llm): retry on InternalServerError and Timeout; handle Gemini returns len(choices) < 1
Do not override user's git config in CLI mode or local machine
Update Slack OAuth URL for the 'Install OpenHands Slack App' button
feat(ds): avoid building tailwind
Update Slack integration 'Add to Slack' button link
Fix the BUG in the __init__ file of openhands to obtain the version
fix: keep tabs visible when agent is stopped
fix: Properly handle AgentRuntimeTimeoutError in runtime base
fix(ci): fix fe unit tests workflow failure due to invalid node-version value
fix: use poetry run for pre-commit in husky hook
fix(tests): fix tests missed by failing frontend test workflow and other flaky tests
Fix configuration precedence in CLI mode
Fix deprecation message to reference SANDBOX_VOLUMES instead of non-existent RUNTIME_MOUNT
